commentary_links.hebrew: וְשַׂמְתֶּם֙ אֶת־דְּבָרַ֣י אֵ֔לֶּה עַל־לְבַבְכֶ֖ם וְעַֽל־נַפְשְׁכֶ֑ם וּקְשַׁרְתֶּ֨ם אֹתָ֤ם לְאוֹת֙ עַל־יֶדְכֶ֔ם וְהָי֥וּ לְטוֹטָפֹ֖ת בֵּ֥ין עֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
commentary_links.english: Therefore impress these My words upon your very heart:gvery heart Lit. “heart and self.” bind them as a sign on your hand and let them serve as a symbol on your forehead,hsymbol on your forehead See notes on 6.8.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וכותי וישראל משומד פסולין שנאמר וקשרתם וכתבתם

commentary_links.hebrew: וּקְשַׁרְתָּ֥ם לְא֖וֹת עַל־יָדֶ֑ךָ וְהָי֥וּ לְטֹטָפֹ֖ת בֵּ֥ין עֵינֶֽיךָ׃ וּכְתַבְתָּ֛ם עַל־מְזֻז֥וֹת בֵּיתֶ֖ךָ וּבִשְׁעָרֶֽיךָ׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: Bind them as a sign on your hand and let them serve as a symbolcsymbol In contrast to others “frontlet”; cf. Exod. 13.16. on your forehead;don your forehead Lit. “between your eyes”; cf. Exod. 13.9. inscribe them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וכותי וישראל משומד פסולין שנאמר וקשרתם וכתבתם
